meta.title: Claw Dots
meta.subtitle: Tracking the convergence toward Agentic OS

paths.label: Foundation Models
paths.description: The brains — LLMs that power everything

pieces.label: GPT-4
pieces.detail: First model smart enough to use tools reliably

pieces.label: Claude 3 Opus
pieces.detail: Constitutional AI — safety-first reasoning

pieces.label: Gemini 2.0
pieces.detail: Native multimodal + code execution

pieces.label: Claude Opus 4.6
pieces.detail: 1M tokens, 14.5h task horizon, agent teams

pieces.label: Open-weight wave
pieces.detail: Llama 3, Mistral Large, DeepSeek — commoditizing intelligence

paths.label: Computer Use
paths.description: AI that can see and control screens like humans

pieces.label: Claude Computer Use
pieces.detail: First commercial model controlling mouse & keyboard

pieces.label: Rabbit R1 / LAM
pieces.detail: Large Action Model — learn apps by watching users

pieces.label: Humane AI Pin ☠️
pieces.detail: Acquired by HP Feb 2025 — all devices bricked

pieces.label: Claude Cowork
pieces.detail: Assign complex tasks, Claude builds plan & executes autonomously

pieces.label: Operator / CUA
pieces.detail: Computer-Using Agent — browse & act on the web

paths.label: Agent Frameworks
paths.description: The plumbing that connects models to actions

pieces.label: AutoGPT
pieces.detail: The OG autonomous agent — proved the concept

pieces.label: LangChain / CrewAI
pieces.detail: Orchestration frameworks — chains, agents, tools

pieces.label: OpenClaw
pieces.detail: Open-source agent runtime — LLM → real software. Going viral in 2026

pieces.label: NemoClaw
pieces.detail: Enterprise security stack on top of OpenClaw — guardrails + policy

pieces.label: Baidu & Alibaba agents
pieces.detail: Chinese tech giants building on OpenClaw framework

paths.label: Agent Protocols
paths.description: How agents talk to each other and to tools

pieces.label: Function Calling
pieces.detail: Structured tool use — the primitive that enabled agents

pieces.label: MCP
pieces.detail: Model Context Protocol — universal agent-to-tool standard

pieces.label: A2A
pieces.detail: Agent-to-Agent protocol — agents discover & collaborate

pieces.label: ACP
pieces.detail: Agent Communication Protocol — local-first agent messaging

pieces.label: Protocol wars
pieces.detail: 10+ competing standards. Convergence expected by 2027. MCP + A2A leading.

paths.label: Agentic OS Platforms
paths.description: Full operating systems for AI agents — the endgame

pieces.label: Sierra Agent OS
pieces.detail: Customer experience agent OS. $10B valuation.

pieces.label: Slack Agentic Workspace
pieces.detail: Positioning as THE agentic work OS — teams + AI agents unified

pieces.label: ZyG
pieces.detail: Agentic OS for DTC e-commerce — marketing, logistics, CX automated

pieces.label: Lyzr
pieces.detail: Enterprise agentic OS — private AI workforce across departments

pieces.label: Airrived
pieces.detail: Agentic OS for cybersecurity + IT + biz ops

pieces.label: Maestro AI
pieces.detail: Agentic OS for mortgage origination — vertical play

pieces.label: Kore.ai
pieces.detail: Multi-agent orchestration for CX + EX at scale

paths.label: AI Wearables & Devices
paths.description: Physical devices that bring agents into the real world

pieces.label: Humane AI Pin ☠️
pieces.detail: Vision killed by bad execution. Acquired by HP, all devices dead.

pieces.label: Rabbit R1
pieces.detail: Survived via software overhauls (RabbitOS 2). Still iterating.

pieces.label: Limitless Pendant
pieces.detail: 100h battery, captures conversations → AI summaries & actions

pieces.label: Omi AI
pieces.detail: Open-source ambient intelligence wearable — privacy-first

pieces.label: Meta Ray-Bans + AI
pieces.detail: Smart glasses with multimodal AI — see, hear, act

convergenceNode.label: Agentic OS
convergenceNode.detail: All paths converge: Foundation Models + Computer Use + Frameworks + Protocols + Platforms + Devices = The Agent Operating System
convergenceNode.prediction: By 2027, your OS IS an agent. Not an app you open — the entire interface.
